title: Build a Linear Probe for Sentiment
relevance: Linear probing is the workhorse of mech interp — the Linear Representation Hypothesis in action.
hints: The probe weight vector w = probe.coef_[0] is a direction in R^768 whose cosine similarity with the true direction approaches 1.0.
For the random baseline: project onto a random unit vector, threshold at the median. This gives ~50% accuracy.
